title: MDA: A Formal Approach to Game Design and Game Research
creator: Robin Hunicke, Marc LeBlanc, and Robert Zubek
description: A short paper proposing mechanics, dynamics, and aesthetics as connected perspectives for designers, researchers, and critics.
useful: A compact shared vocabulary; most useful when treated as one analytical model rather than a universal law.
audience: Designers, students, and researchers who need a compact shared analytical model.
learning: Use MDA as a lens without treating it as a law
